description: Model routing per agent — assigns specific models and effort levels to foundation agents

BA.rationale: BA explores and asks questions — fast model is sufficient

SAD.rationale: SAD makes architectural decisions — needs strong reasoning

DEV.rationale: DEV writes code — needs strong coding + tool-use model

QA.rationale: QA reviews and validates — fresh-context model required

OPS.rationale: OPS runs commands and validates config — speed over reasoning

GOV.rationale: GOV audits security/compliance — needs thorough reasoning

DOC.rationale: DOC writes docs — clarity over compute

SESSION.rationale: Session management is deterministic state tracking

PREMORTEM.rationale: Premortem needs creative scenario generation + structured synthesis

SALES.rationale: Sales methodology — structured but not compute-heavy

LEGAL.rationale: Legal compliance is non-negotiable — thorough review needed
